candidate: L19 SHORT-SALE-INTENSITY cross-sectional factor (REAL DATA; pre-registered, measurement-only). A GENUINELY NEW factor AXIS (short-selling positioning / flow), never tested in L1-L18. Newly enabled because a real offline short-sale archive was discovered (data/bist_datastore_archive/short_selling, monthly per-stock short-sale TL volume, 2015-2026). NOT a scaffold: this is a real-data cross-sectional edge test. Repo READ-ONLY (writes only under lab-demo-goal/), NO network, ASCII.

data_provenance.short_panel: data/bist_datastore_archive/short_selling/PP_ACIGASATIS.M.YYYYMM.zip -> xlsx, monthly Acial Satis Bulteni; per stock columns [symbol(.E), instrument_type, market, SHORT_SALE_VALUE_TL, qty, low, high]. Use SHORT_SALE_VALUE_TL (col index 3).
data_provenance.price_panel: data/clean_universe/adjusted_prices_2019_2026.parquet [date,symbol,close,value_tl,adjusted_close,bist30,bist100,...]; monthly returns from adjusted_close, monthly total traded TL from sum(value_tl).
data_provenance.overlap_window: short-populated months intersect price panel = 2019-01 .. 2026-02, MINUS short-ban gaps (2020-03..06 COVID ban; 2023 + parts of 2024 turmoil bans). Recent months are a RESTRICTED ~50-name shortable universe; early months ~290-325 names.
data_provenance.symbol_join: strip trailing .E from short symbols to match bare price tickers.

hypothesis: Short-selling pressure is informed: stocks with HIGH short-sale intensity subsequently UNDERPERFORM, stocks with LOW short-sale intensity OUTPERFORM (Boehmer/Jones/Zhang-style). DEPLOYABLE form: long the LOW-short-intensity tercile in the LIQUID universe, market-relative, net of realistic cost; significant and regime-stable.

signal_FROZEN.definition: short_intensity(symbol, month m) = short_sale_value_tl(m) / total_traded_value_tl(m). total_traded_value_tl(m) = sum of daily value_tl over month m from the price panel. Cross-sectional rank into terciles each month.
signal_FROZEN.sign_convention: LOW short_intensity = LONG (positive-information leg); HIGH short_intensity = SHORT. Corroboration L-S = mean(LOW tercile) - mean(HIGH tercile).
signal_FROZEN.new_axis: short-selling positioning -> orthogonal to the price/volume/fundamental/sentiment graveyard (L1-L18). Not derivable from price or fundamentals alone.

look_ahead_safety_FROZEN.primary: signal from month m -> forward return over month m+1 (position formed at end of m). ASSUMPTION (stated): the monthly short bulletin for month m is published at/just after month-end and is available at the start of m+1 (true for BIST's monthly Acial Satis Bulteni).
look_ahead_safety_FROZEN.robustness: SKIP-MONTH variant: signal month m -> forward return over month m+2 (position formed at end of m+1). Unambiguously look-ahead-safe; bounds the publication-lag sensitivity. Report BOTH; if they disagree in sign/significance, that is a finding.
look_ahead_safety_FROZEN.return_def: adjusted_close(end of forward month) / adjusted_close(end of signal/entry month) - 1; market-relative = minus EW mean forward return over the same-scope universe that month.

universe_FROZEN.liquid: >= 1.0e7 TL trailing-63-trading-day median daily value_tl at the signal month-end (D-205 absolute threshold, reused).

portfolio_FROZEN.primary_gate: LIQUID LOW-short-intensity tercile, EW long, market-relative net of cost
portfolio_FROZEN.corroboration: L-S spread (LOW minus HIGH tercile), and ALL-scope versions

cost_FROZEN: Realistic round-trip per D-207/D-208 liquid range; charge round_trip_bps * monthly turnover of the long basket. round_trip_bps frozen at 40 (liquid mid-range). Report gross, net, realized turnover, breakeven_cost_bps.

stats_FROZEN.nw_t: Newey-West HAC t (lag 6) on the monthly market-relative active-return series

keep_bar_FROZEN: Deploy-edge <=> LIQUID LOW-tercile market-relative NET mean > 0 AND |NW-t| >= 2.0 AND regime-sign-stable, net of cost. Else SHORT-INTENSITY-NOT-TRADEABLE. (Two-way verdict like D-205/D-209: TRADEABLE-EDGE -> deploy-candidate for Cagan review; else clean-archive.)

honest_expectation_DECLARED_BEFORE_RESUL.summary: The short-pressure anomaly is robust in US/DM equities, but BIST faces: (a) repeated short-sale BANS -> long gaps and a structurally selected sample, (b) a RESTRICTED ~50-name shortable universe recently -> thin, large-cap-only cross-section in the modern regime, (c) MONTHLY (not daily) granularity -> weak timing. So the prior is MODERATE-to-WEAK; most likely a significance-wall or regime-sign-instability (the modern restricted regime may behave differently from the broad early regime). NO celebration expected; record whatever the result. If it DOES clear the keep-bar it is a genuine deploy-candidate to surface to Cagan, not to bury.
honest_expectation_DECLARED_BEFORE_RESUL.most_likely_verdict: SHORT-INTENSITY-NOT-TRADEABLE (significance-wall or regime sign-instability); no deployable edge.
